title: Phantom Config
body:
Fabric requires Cloth Config API and Fabric API

Forge requires Cloth Config API


Configure many features of phantoms such as:
- How soon they start spawning
- How they spawn (insanity from the distant end or lack of sleep)
- How many spawn
- Light level of the player where they spawn
- Whether or not they spawn in mushroom biomes
- And how often they spawn!
